name: Claude (Product)
description: Verified app, desktop, mobile, and add-in launches from Claude.
headline: Verified Claude product launches across {days} days.
subtitle: January 12 — April 17, 2026. Cross-checked against official Claude release notes and product pages.
footnote: Cross-checked on April 24, 2026 against official Claude Help Center release notes, Claude product posts, and Anthropic announcements. No new consumer product surface changes in the April 18–24 window.

releases.title: Cowork research preview on Claude Desktop
releases.whatChanged: Desktop app adds a dedicated Cowork space for multi-step work on your files and tools.
releases.description: Anthropic introduced Cowork as an agentic desktop workspace for knowledge work beyond coding, initially available to Max plan users on macOS.

prerequisites: Research preview available in your region/plan
steps: Open Claude Desktop and switch to the Cowork experience.
Connect or select the folders and tools Cowork should use.
Describe the outcome you want; iterate on drafts and file changes in the thread.

releases.title: Interactive connectors and MCP Apps
releases.description: Claude gained interactive connectors that can render and operate live app interfaces in chat.

releases.title: Claude for PowerPoint
releases.description: Claude shipped as a PowerPoint add-in for drafting, editing, and restructuring slide decks.

releases.title: Cowork enterprise plugins launch
releases.description: 13 enterprise connectors added (Google Workspace, DocuSign, FactSet, Apollo, Harvey, and more), plus admin controls, group spend limits, and prebuilt plugin templates for finance, HR, engineering, and design.

releases.title: Chat search and memory for free users
releases.description: Memory from chat history expanded beyond paid plans to all Claude users.

releases.title: Claude for Excel and PowerPoint work across apps
releases.description: Claude began sharing full context across open Excel and PowerPoint workflows.

releases.title: Custom visuals in chat
releases.description: Claude started generating interactive charts, diagrams, and visual explanations inline in chat.

releases.title: Persistent Cowork thread from mobile (Dispatch)
releases.description: Pro and Max users got a persistent Cowork thread manageable from Claude mobile: pair iPhone to Mac via QR code, send tasks from mobile, and return to finished work on the desktop.

releases.title: Computer use in Cowork and Claude Code
releases.description: Claude introduced computer use in research preview for Cowork and Claude Code, allowing on-device clicks, navigation, and tool execution from desktop workflows.

releases.title: Cowork GA: computer use, analytics, and enterprise controls
releases.description: Claude release notes announced Cowork GA on macOS and Windows for paid plans, with enterprise analytics and access-control enhancements.

releases.title: Claude Opus 4.7 available in all consumer products
releases.description: Opus 4.7 launched across Claude consumer products with gains in coding, higher-resolution image understanding, and stronger instruction following; Claude Code raised default effort to xhigh and added a /ultrareview slash command for Pro/Max.

releases.title: Claude Design research preview from Anthropic Labs
releases.description: Anthropic Labs launched Claude Design in research preview for Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise users, pairing a chat panel with a canvas to generate and iterate on designs, prototypes, slides, and one-pagers with automatic design-system pickup and exports to PDF, PPTX, HTML, Canva, and Claude Code.

releases.title: Mobile offline drafts for Claude apps
releases.description: Claude iOS and Android apps now support offline draft capture and sync-on-reconnect for long-form prompts and notes.
